archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Dark Mode / IDE Terminal Variant
domain_context: Test Automation & DevOps Practice Ground (Developer Tool)

background.description: Tailwind zinc-950. Deepest void background for the application canvas.

surface.description: Tailwind zinc-900 for cards/panels. Hover state uses zinc-800.

border.description: Tailwind zinc-800 for structural borders. Zinc-600/500 for hover/focus states to simulate IDE active states.

text.description: Zinc-50 for high contrast primary text, Zinc-400 for secondary descriptions.

accents.description: IDE syntax highlighting colors for tags, badges, and action buttons. Primary is blue-500, with semantic colors for test states.

rules.code: font-mono text-sm text-blue-400 bg-zinc-900/50 px-1 py-0.5 rounded border border-zinc-800

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, scanable, highly structured, resembling a complex developer IDE or dashboard.

practice_grid.container: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-4 lg:gap-6 w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8
practice_grid.card_item: flex flex-col relative p-5 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 hover:border-zinc-500 hover:bg-zinc-800/50 hover:-translate-y-0.5 group
practice_grid.badge: absolute top-4 right-4 font-mono text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-400 bg-zinc-950 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-zinc-800
practice_grid.title: text-lg font-bold text-zinc-100 mt-2 mb-1 group-hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors

individual_practice_page.layout: 2-column layout on large screens. Left: Sidebar with navigation/context. Right: Main interaction area.
individual_practice_page.content_card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 lg:p-10 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/80 border-b border-zinc-800
header.content: flex items-center justify-between h-16 px-4 lg:px-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto

component_instructions.general: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts. Heavily rely on customized Shadcn components for forms, tables, modals, tabs, and complex inputs to ensure standard HTML semantics which SDETs need for automation testing.
component_instructions.buttons: Flat design, rounded-md (max 6px). Primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white. Secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn standard but strictly with border-zinc-800, bg-zinc-950, text-zinc-100, focus:ring-blue-500/50 focus:border-blue-500.
component_instructions.data_testid_requirement: CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields, cards, tabs, modal triggers, pagination) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case describing the element's role (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"', 'data-testid="practice-card-1"').

surfaces_and_microthemes.cards: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Exposed skeleton, flat backgrounds. No heavy drop shadows; use 1px inner borders or subtle drop-shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] for floating modals.
surfaces_and_microthemes.glassmorphism: Used only for Header and sticky elements. Must have backdrop-blur-xl, bg-zinc-950/80, and a sharp 1px bottom border border-zinc-800.
surfaces_and_microthemes.retro_terminal: Incorporate for the API Playground section. Use a black background, monospace fonts, and syntax-highlighted JSON responses.

icons.usage: Use crisp, minimalist icons. Avoid heavy/filled variants. Standardize sizing to 16px (w-4 h-4) for labels/buttons and 24px (w-6 h-6) for hero elements.

image_urls.description: Dynamic abstract blue light patterns with a dark backdrop. Use as a subtle, low-opacity (10-20%) background in the landing hero section to convey data/motion.
Close-up of HTML/code on a dark screen. Use as a banner or split-screen visual for the API Playground section.

motion.hover: Fast transitions (duration-150 or duration-200). Use subtle transforms (-translate-y-0.5) on grid cards, and strict color/border changes.
motion.page_transition: Simple fade-in (opacity-0 to opacity-100) using framer-motion or basic CSS animations to maintain a lightweight, fast developer-tool feel.
